title: Immersed With Shaders
description: Fabric Modpack, Spectacular Visuals, Boosted FPS, Immersive sounds & ambience, QoL mods, Works on vanilla servers
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/IWS/BH_NU_HEADER.webp)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IU4I3IY6Kpk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Distant Horizons 2.0 shader update available now! Use Complementary Unbound Shader to experience jaw-dropping visuals!**

![DH](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/905121f69e55e50d019690b8e3a727b7442000bc.png)

![BH Partner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/IWS/BH_NU_PROMO.webp)

If you want a server to play with your friends Bisect Hosting offers great servers with lag free connection, highly efficient staff teams, many resources and overall very easy setting up. 6GB is highly recommended, [Click Here](https://www.bisecthosting.com/NINJA79) And Make Sure To Use Coupon!

![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/IWS/BH_NU_BANNER1.webp)

Immersed With Shaders is a fully client side modpack, The best Performance & FPS you can get on minecraft, also with Quality of Life mods, shaders and enhanced vanilla sounds and ambience, and spectacular visuals.

[Click Here](https://discord.gg/Ky9JCDAseb) To Join My Discord

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/IWS/BH_NU_BANNER2.webp)

- ✅Vanilla Server Compatible
- ✅Built In Shaders
- ✅Fully Client Side
- ✅Supports All PC's
- ✅High FPS Boost & Optimizations
- ✅Many Visual Improvements
- ✅Better HUD
- ✅Supports 1.20 (1.x)
- ✅Enhanced Sounds & Ambience
- ✅Easy To Use
- ✅Xaero's Maps Mod (m)
- ✅Custom Music Mod
- ✅Zoom Feature (c)
- ✅Enhanced Animations
- ✅Many Quality of Life Improvements
- LOTS MORE!
- No Optifine Needed!

![Shader Customization](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/IWS/BH_NU_BANNER4.webp)

To enable shaders, go to pause menu > Video Settings > Shader Packs > Select the shader that's there and click apply. Toggle Shaders button available too in controls.

I own none of these mods or shaders, all credit goes to the mod authors and shader authors. 
- Complementary Shaders (EminGT) 
- Voyager Shader 2.0 (symbiome67)
